summary: Trazabilidad Unificada module testing completed. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Fixed date conversion bug in trazabilidad.py (fecha_deteccion, fecha_envio, fecha_retorno were strings but DB expected date objects). Frontend: TrazabilidadPanel renders correctly with Balance del Lote, Timeline, Fallados, Arreglos, Diferencias tabs. Added type='button' to dialog buttons to prevent form submission issues.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/fallados - returns list (empty or with data)
Backend: GET /api/fallados?registro_id=... - filter by registro works
Backend: POST /api/fallados - create fallado with valid data
Backend: POST /api/fallados - validation: reparable + no_reparable > detectada returns 400
Backend: PUT /api/fallados/{id} - update fallado
Backend: PUT /api/fallados/{id} - 404 for non-existent fallado
Backend: DELETE /api/fallados/{id} - delete fallado (cascades arreglos)
Backend: GET /api/arreglos - returns list
Backend: GET /api/arreglos?registro_id=... - filter by registro works
Backend: POST /api/arreglos - create arreglo linked to fallado
Backend: POST /api/arreglos - validation: cantidad_enviada > reparables returns 400
Backend: POST /api/arreglos - 404 for non-existent fallado
Backend: PUT /api/arreglos/{id}/cerrar - close arreglo with result
Backend: PUT /api/arreglos/{id}/cerrar - validation: resuelta + no_resuelta > enviada returns 400
Backend: PUT /api/arreglos/{id}/cerrar - 404 for non-existent arreglo
Backend: DELETE /api/arreglos/{id} - delete arreglo
Backend: GET /api/registros/{id}/resumen-cantidades - returns balance with all required fields
Backend: GET /api/registros/{id}/resumen-cantidades - 404 for non-existent registro
Backend: GET /api/registros/{id}/trazabilidad-completa - returns timeline with eventos
Backend: GET /api/registros/{id}/trazabilidad-completa - 404 for non-existent registro
Frontend: TrazabilidadPanel renders in RegistroForm edit page
Frontend: Balance del Lote shows INICIAL, FALTANTE, FALLADOS, REPARADOS, PEND. ARREGLO, LIQUIDACION
Frontend: Tabs (Timeline, Fallados, Arreglos, Diferencias) are clickable
Frontend: Timeline shows MOVIMIENTO events with dates and details
Frontend: Fallados tab shows 'Sin productos fallados' when empty
Frontend: 'Registrar Fallado' button is present and has data-testid
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Date conversion bug in trazabilidad.py - fecha_deteccion, fecha_envio, fecha_retorno were passed as strings but asyncpg requires date objects. Added date.fromisoformat() conversion.
Added type='button' to all dialog buttons in TrazabilidadPanel.jsx to prevent accidental form submission
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: registro c74d3460-3e8b-4d4c-88e5-06bff012d6f5 (Corte 01, Producto Terminado, 5 movimientos, 490 prendas)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trazabilidad Unificada module fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: /api/fallados (CRUD), /api/arreglos (CRUD + cerrar), /api/registros/{id}/resumen-cantidades, /api/registros/{id}/trazabilidad-completa. Frontend: TrazabilidadPanel component with Balance del Lote, Timeline, Fallados, Arreglos, Diferencias tabs. Tables prod_fallados and prod_arreglos are created on startup via init_trazabilidad_tables(). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_trazabilidad.py with 22 tests.
rca_of_the_issue: Date conversion bug: asyncpg requires date objects for DATE columns, but the code was passing string dates. Fixed by converting strings to date objects using date.fromisoformat() before database operations.
